zh.lifeSummary: Roger of Salisbury是Salisbury和Mrs Salisbury的兒子，於1065年出生在法國諾門迪曼其阿福朗徹斯。他於大約1089年與Matilda of Ramsbury在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1139年12月11日在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Roger of Salisbury是Salisbury和Mrs Salisbury的儿子，于1065年出生在法国諾門迪曼其阿福朗徹斯。他于大约1089年与Matilda of Ramsbury在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1139年12月11日在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Salisbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name primarily from Salesbury in Blackburn (Lancashire) but also occasionally from Salisbury (Wiltshire). The Lancashire placename derives from Old English salh ‘willow, sallow’ + burg ‘fortress’, while the Wiltshire placename arises from a shortened form of the Celtic placename Sorviodunum (from an unknown initial element + Celtic dūno- ‘fort’). In the Old English period the second element was dropped and Sorvio- (of unexplained etymology) became Searo- in Old English as the result of folk etymological association the Old English word searu ‘trick’; to this an explanatory burh ‘fortress, manor, town’ was added. The city is recorded in the Domesday Book as Sarisberie; the change of -r- to -l- is the result of later dissimilation.

variants.name: Salsbury
meanings: Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of Salomon or some other Jewish name beginning with Sa-.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Roger of Salisbury was born in 1065, in Avranches, Manche, Normandy, France as the son of Salisbury and Mrs Salisbury. He married Matilda of Ramsbury about 1089, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 11 December 1139, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Roger of Salisbury est né en 1065, à Avranches, Manche, Normandie, France, fils de Salisbury et Mrs Salisbury. Il a épousé Matilda of Ramsbury environ 1089, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 décembre 1139, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Roger of Salisbury wurde 1065 in Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Salisbury und Mrs Salisbury geboren. Er hat um 1089 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda of Ramsbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. Dezember 1139 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Roger of Salisbury è nato il nel 1065 nel Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Francia come figlio di Salisbury e Mrs Salisbury. Lui sposato Matilda of Ramsbury circa 1089, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 dicembre 1139, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger of Salisburyは1065年にフランスノーマンディマンチェアvランチェスでSalisburyとMrs Salisburyの息子として生まれた。約1089年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでMatilda of Ramsburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1139年12月11日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger of Salisbury(은)는 1065년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 아브랭체스에서 Salisbury(와)과 Mrs Salisbury의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1089년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Matilda of Ramsbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1139년 12월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Roger of Salisbury nasceu em 1065, em Avranches, Manche, Normandie, França filho de Salisbury e Mrs Salisbury. Ele casou-se com Matilda of Ramsbury aproximadamente 1089, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1139, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Roger of Salisbury родился в 1065 г. в местности авранчесь, манч, норманди, Франция. Его родителей звали Salisbury и Mrs Salisbury. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda of Ramsbury около 1089 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 11 декабря 1139 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Roger of Salisbury nació en 1065, en Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Francia como hijo de Salisbury y Mrs Salisbury. Se casó con Matilda of Ramsbury aproximadamente 1089, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1139, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
